actors.name: External User
actors.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

actors.name: Validator
actors.description: Node operator securing the chain and participating in consensus.

actors.name: Protocol
actors.description: Entity deploying dApps and Reward Vaults on Berachain.

actors.name: Guardian
actors.description: System overseeing the governance timelock via a multisig.

actors.name: Incentive Token Manager
actors.description: Wallet address responsible for offering and managing incentive tokens for a Reward Vault.

actors.name: BGT Foundation
actors.description: Entity responsible for reviewing Request for Reward Vault (RFRV) submissions.

actors.name: Developer
capabilities: Stake in Vaults on behalf of users

assets.name: Private Key
assets.description: Cryptographic key used to access and control assets in a wallet.

assets.name: Voting Power
assets.description: Influence in governance decisions, derived from BGT holdings/delegation.

assets.name: Liquidity
assets.description: Tokens available in liquidity pools for trading.

assets.name: Receipt Token
assets.description: Token representing proof of contribution to liquidity or other productive activity.

assets.name: Collateral Asset
assets.description: Assets (e.g., USDC, BYUSD) used to mint $HONEY.

assets.name: Incentive Token
assets.description: Tokens offered by protocols to validators/boosters to attract BGT emissions.

assets.name: Governance Proposal
assets.description: Proposed changes to the Berachain protocol or dApp parameters.

assets.name: Transaction Fee
assets.description: Cost paid in $BERA to execute a transaction on the network.

assets.name: MEV
assets.description: Miner Extractable Value, earned by validators from transaction ordering.

assets.name: LP Token
assets.description: Receipt token specifically for providing liquidity in BEX pools.

assets.name: Vault Share
assets.description: Token representing a user's proportional deposit in a $HONEY vault.

components.name: Berachain
components.description: High-performance EVM-Identical Layer 1 blockchain utilizing Proof-of-Liquidity.

components.name: EVM Execution Client
components.description: Software responsible for executing smart contracts and managing state changes.

components.name: BeaconKit
components.description: Modular consensus layer framework leveraging CometBFT.

components.name: CometBFT
components.description: General-purpose blockchain consensus engine used by BeaconKit.

components.name: User Wallet
components.description: Software or hardware storing user private keys and interacting with the blockchain.

components.name: Berachain Bridge
components.description: Canonical bridge powered by LayerZero for transferring assets between chains.

components.name: Centralized Exchange
components.description: External platform for trading crypto assets.

components.name: Honey Swap
components.description: Native dApp for trading assets for $HONEY and minting $HONEY.

components.name: BeraHub (Frontend)
components.description: Web interface for managing $BGT, accessing liquidity, and participating in governance.

components.name: Reward Vault (Smart Contract)
components.description: Smart contract where users stake PoL-eligible assets to earn $BGT rewards.

components.name: Governance Contract
components.description: Smart contract managing governance proposals, voting, and delegation.

components.name: HoneyFactory (Smart Contract)
components.description: Central smart contract hub for $HONEY minting, connecting vaults.

components.name: FeeCollector (Smart Contract)
components.description: Smart contract collecting dApp fees and distributing them to $BGT holders.

components.name: BGTIncentiveDistributor (Smart Contract)
components.description: Smart contract managing the distribution and claiming of Incentive Tokens for Boosters.

components.name: BeraChef contract (Smart Contract)
components.description: Smart contract related to Reward Vault whitelisting.

components.name: Airdrop Site
components.description: External website for checking airdrop allocation and claiming tokens.

data_flows.description: User initiates a transaction on the blockchain.
User sends assets to the bridge contract.
Bridge transfers assets onto Berachain.
User withdraws tokens from a centralized exchange to their wallet.
User sends tokens to BEX for swapping or providing liquidity.
BEX sends swapped tokens or LP tokens back to the user wallet.
User sends collateral assets to Honey Swap to mint $HONEY.
Honey Swap sends minted $HONEY or vault shares to the user wallet.
User stakes PoL-eligible tokens in a Reward Vault.
BGT rewards available for claiming by the user from a Reward Vault.
Incentive tokens available for claiming by the user from the distributor.
dApp fees available for claiming by the user from the FeeCollector.
User interacts with the BeraHub frontend.
BeraHub queries chain state data.
Berachain returns state data to BeraHub.
BeraHub submits transactions to the chain on behalf of the user.
Berachain returns transaction status or state changes to BeraHub.
Validator stakes BERA on the chain.
Validator directs a portion of BGT emissions to a Reward Vault.
Reward Vault sends incentive tokens to the distribution contract.
Incentive distributor sends commission to the validator.
Validator collects transaction fees and MEV and sends them to the FeeCollector.
Protocol offers incentive tokens to a Reward Vault.
Protocol submits a governance proposal (e.g., for whitelisting).
User delegates BGT voting power to a validator.
User casts a vote on a governance proposal.
User submits a new governance proposal.
Validator proposes a new block to the chain.
Berachain distributes block rewards to the validator.
Governance contract executes a passed proposal on the chain.
Guardian cancels a malicious governance proposal during the timelock.
Berachain provides airdrop allocation data to the Airdrop Site.
Airdrop Site initiates a claim transaction on Berachain.
Incentive Token Manager adds or updates incentive tokens/rate in a Reward Vault.
User Wallet claims BGT rewards directly from the Reward Vault smart contract.
User Wallet claims Incentive Tokens directly from the BGTIncentiveDistributor smart contract.
User Wallet claims dApp Fees directly from the FeeCollector smart contract.

trust_boundaries.name: User Wallet to Berachain
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the user's local wallet environment from the core blockchain network.

trust_boundaries.name: Berachain Bridge to Berachain
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the external bridging service from the core blockchain network.

trust_boundaries.name: Centralized Exchange to User Wallet
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the external centralized exchange from the user's local wallet.

trust_boundaries.name: Validator to Berachain
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the validator node from the core blockchain consensus.

trust_boundaries.name: Validator to Reward Vault
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the validator's reward allocation logic from the Reward Vault contract.

trust_boundaries.name: User Wallet to BEX
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the user's wallet from the native DEX smart contract.

trust_boundaries.name: User Wallet to Honey Swap
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the user's wallet from the native Honey Swap smart contract.

trust_boundaries.name: User Wallet to Reward Vault
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the user's wallet from the Reward Vault smart contract.

trust_boundaries.name: User Wallet to Governance Contract
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the user's wallet from the Governance smart contract.

trust_boundaries.name: Protocol to Governance Contract
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the external protocol entity from the Governance smart contract.

trust_boundaries.name: Incentive Token Manager to Reward Vault
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the Incentive Token Manager's wallet from the Reward Vault contract.

trust_boundaries.name: Governance Contract to Guardian
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the Governance contract execution from the Guardian oversight mechanism.

trust_boundaries.name: Berachain to EVM Execution Client
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the core chain logic from the EVM execution environment.

trust_boundaries.name: Berachain to BeaconKit
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the core chain logic from the consensus layer framework.

trust_boundaries.name: BeaconKit to CometBFT
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the BeaconKit framework from the underlying CometBFT consensus engine.

trust_boundaries.name: Reward Vault to BGTIncentiveDistributor
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the Reward Vault from the Incentive Token distribution contract.

trust_boundaries.name: FeeCollector to User Wallet
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the FeeCollector contract from the user's wallet during fee distribution.

trust_boundaries.name: FeeCollector to Validator
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the FeeCollector contract from the Validator during fee collection.

trust_boundaries.name: BeraHub to User Wallet
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the BeraHub frontend from the user's local wallet.

trust_boundaries.name: BeraHub to Berachain
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the BeraHub frontend from the core blockchain network for read operations.

trust_boundaries.name: External User to Airdrop Site
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the user from the external Airdrop Site.

trust_boundaries.name: Airdrop Site to Berachain
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the external Airdrop Site from the core blockchain network.

trust_boundaries.name: User Wallet to BGTIncentiveDistributor
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the user's wallet from the BGTIncentiveDistributor smart contract for claiming incentives.

trust_boundaries.name: User Wallet to FeeCollector
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the user's wallet from the FeeCollector smart contract for claiming dApp fees.

trust_boundaries.name: Protocol to Reward Vault
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the external protocol entity from the Reward Vault contract for creation and incentive offering.

trust_boundaries.name: Developer to Reward Vault
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the developer entity from the Reward Vault contract for staking on behalf of users.

behaviors.name: Bridge Tokens/NFTs
behaviors.description: External User transfers assets via the Berachain Bridge.

behaviors.name: Trade Tokens
behaviors.description: External User trades tokens on a Centralized Exchange.

behaviors.name: Withdraw Tokens
behaviors.description: External User withdraws tokens from a Centralized Exchange.

behaviors.name: Swap Assets
behaviors.description: External User exchanges one token for another on BEX.

behaviors.name: Provide Liquidity
behaviors.description: External User deposits tokens into a BEX liquidity pool.

behaviors.name: Mint HONEY
behaviors.description: External User mints $HONEY using collateral assets on Honey Swap.

behaviors.name: Burn HONEY
behaviors.description: External User burns $HONEY to redeem collateral assets on Honey Swap.

behaviors.name: Stake Assets
behaviors.description: External User stakes PoL-eligible assets in a Reward Vault.

behaviors.name: Withdraw Staked Assets
behaviors.description: External User withdraws staked assets from a Reward Vault.

behaviors.name: View Info (BeraHub)
behaviors.description: External User views information on BeraHub (vaults, validators, etc.).

behaviors.name: Claim Rewards (BeraHub)
behaviors.description: External User claims earned rewards (BGT, Incentives, Fees) via BeraHub.

behaviors.name: Create Governance Proposal
behaviors.description: External User creates a governance proposal.

behaviors.name: Vote on Governance Proposal
behaviors.description: External User casts a vote on a governance proposal.

behaviors.name: Delegate BGT
behaviors.description: External User delegates their BGT voting power.

behaviors.name: Stake BERA
behaviors.description: Validator stakes BERA to participate in consensus.

behaviors.name: Propose Block
behaviors.description: Validator proposes a new block to the chain.

behaviors.name: Direct BGT Emissions
behaviors.description: Validator allocates a portion of BGT emissions to a specific Reward Vault.

behaviors.name: Receive Incentive Commission
behaviors.description: Validator receives a commission on incentive tokens distributed via the BGTIncentiveDistributor.

behaviors.name: Collect Fees/MEV
behaviors.description: Validator collects transaction fees and MEV and sends them to the FeeCollector.

behaviors.name: Create Reward Vault
behaviors.description: Protocol creates a new Reward Vault smart contract.

behaviors.name: Submit Governance Proposal
behaviors.description: Protocol submits a governance proposal, typically for whitelisting a Reward Vault or Incentive Token.

behaviors.name: Offer Incentive Tokens
behaviors.description: Protocol offers incentive tokens to a Reward Vault to attract BGT emissions.

behaviors.name: Add Incentive Tokens
behaviors.description: Incentive Token Manager adds more incentive tokens to a Reward Vault.

behaviors.name: Increase Incentive Rate
behaviors.description: Incentive Token Manager increases the rate at which incentive tokens are distributed from a Reward Vault.

behaviors.name: Cancel Governance Proposal
behaviors.description: Guardian cancels a malicious governance proposal during the timelock period.

behaviors.name: Execute Governance Proposal
behaviors.description: Governance contract executes the changes defined in a passed proposal on the blockchain.

behaviors.name: Distribute Incentive Tokens
behaviors.description: BGTIncentiveDistributor distributes incentive tokens to eligible users on the chain.

behaviors.name: Distribute dApp Fees
behaviors.description: FeeCollector distributes collected dApp fees (WBERA) to eligible users on the chain.

behaviors.name: Distribute Block Rewards
behaviors.description: Berachain distributes BGT emissions and collected fees/MEV to the block-proposing validator.

behaviors.name: Check Airdrop Allocation
behaviors.description: External User checks their airdrop allocation on the Airdrop Site.

behaviors.name: Claim Airdrop Tokens
behaviors.description: External User claims their allocated airdrop tokens via the Airdrop Site.

behaviors.name: Stake on Behalf of User
behaviors.description: Developer stakes assets in a Reward Vault on behalf of a user.

behaviors.name: Redeem BGT for BERA
behaviors.description: External User redeems (burns) BGT for BERA.

behaviors.name: Change Validator Commission Rate
behaviors.description: Validator changes their commission rate for incentives.

behaviors.name: Claim BGT (Direct)
behaviors.description: External User claims BGT rewards directly from the Reward Vault smart contract.

behaviors.name: Claim Incentive Tokens (Direct)
behaviors.description: External User claims Incentive Tokens directly from the BGTIncentiveDistributor smart contract.

behaviors.name: Claim dApp Fees (Direct)
behaviors.description: External User claims dApp Fees directly from the FeeCollector smart contract.
